title: Connect activity log data to GSheets?
excerpt: Has anyone found an app for connecting Activity Log data to GSheets? I see several about connecting gsheet data into Monday, but I’d like to pull Activity Log data out into Gsheets without running manual exports every da…

posts.author: sarahcullerton (Sarah Cullerton)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anyone found an app for connecting Activity Log data to GSheets? I see several about connecting gsheet data into Monday, but I’d like to pull Activity Log data out into Gsheets without running manual exports every day.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sarahcullerton ,
I suppose your case can be addresses with the Board Email Reports app.
It aggregates the changes in the activity log by the column you choose and over the period you choose in the automation rule, and sends the xls-report to the people you mention in the rule (no guest access needed!).
Report types

On a board/project level:

  1. New and updated tasks
  2. Status updates
  3. Budget, Costs, Revenue changes
  4. Timeline and deadline overdue
  5. Time Tracking changes

On an item/task level:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates

An example:

image1386×555 53 KB

The message in my inbox with xls-attachment where you can find updates details:
image395×499 21 KB

I hope you’ll find the app helpful.
